questions.q: According to a May 2026 report in The Atlantic, what is the specialty of Dr. Stephen Kornfeld, the passenger who had to take over medical duties during a deadly hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship?
Which genetic variant was reported in May 2026 to explain why GLP-1 weight-loss medications don't work for about one in ten people?
In May 2026, the WHO addressed concerns over the deadly MV Hondius cruise ship hantavirus outbreak by emphasizing what key point?
options: It is unlikely to be the next pandemic
It has airborne transmission identical to COVID
A global travel lockdown is needed immediately
It is a completely new, unknown virus strain
questions.correctText: It is unlikely to be the next pandemic

questions.q: A May 2026 Weill Cornell Medicine study showed that flipping an immune system switch related to which cells could help stop gut inflammation?
A May 2026 Cornell University study suggested that marginal deficiency of which vitamin could negatively affect healthy aging and cellular metabolism?
